calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Co-Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christopher Jew for (petitioner) Alexander Mitchell.

The Court stated that it has read the petition, that it is prepared to confirm and accept the appointment & resignation and asked counsel if there was anything further. Mr. Jew stated that in regards to the resignation of Florence Battle the trust is not under Court supervision. The Court granted the petition for order accepting resignation of co-trustee and for appointment of successor co-trustee (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
